mentions.note: Had big run (close to triple from Cramer's call); now paused catching breath. Don't sell, but would buy if pulled back to 10.
Record-breaking quarter; acquisition of Webster Bank excellent. Cramer wrote CEO praising franchise value. Bullish on bank consolidation play.
CEO Ana Botín leading European bank positioned to break out; superior to Deutsche Bank on valuation and execution. Own SAN over DB.
Spanish bank up 142% in 12 months; 17% EPS growth 2025, 180M customers; Webster acquisition expands NE footprint; targeting 18% ROTCE by 2028; profitability + scale winning formula.
International bank alternative; preferred to Nubank for exposure to diversified global banking.
Regional bank; CEO Anna Botín excellent; Cramer redoubling efforts to push; strong buy signal in Lightning Round.
